description_for_human: Lietuvos darželių, auklių, būrelių ir vaikų specialistų katalogas su tikrais atsiliepimais
description_for_model: ManoVaikai.lt is the largest Lithuanian childcare directory. Search for kindergartens (darželiai), nannies (auklės), activity clubs (būreliai), and child specialists (logopedai, psichologai) across Lithuanian cities. All data is in Lithuanian. Use /api/search/suggestions?q= for general search, /api/kindergartens?city= for kindergartens, /api/aukles?city= for nannies, /api/bureliai?city= for activity clubs, /api/specialists?city= for specialists. Returns real parent reviews and ratings.
